prose.en: Disable, when not intended for use, wireless networking capabilities embedded within system components prior to issuance and deployment.

guidance.en: Wireless networking capabilities that are embedded within system components represent a significant potential vulnerability that can be exploited by adversaries. Disabling wireless capabilities when not needed for essential organizational missions or functions can reduce susceptibility to threats by adversaries involving wireless technologies.

prose.en: when not intended for use, wireless networking capabilities embedded within system components are disabled prior to issuance and deployment.

objects.en: procedures addressing wireless implementation and usage (including restrictions)
system configuration settings and associated documentation
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
Mechanisms managing the disabling of wireless networking capabilities internally embedded within system components
